name: anton-terminal
description: Autonomous Solana meme coin trading agent. DeepSeek brain, on-chain smart-money learning, persistent memory, cyberpunk/brutalist dashboard.

scripts.dash:live: concurrently -k -n REALTIME,DASH -c magenta,cyan "pnpm realtime" "cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_MOCK=0 pnpm --filter @anton/dashboard dev"
scripts.dash:agent: concurrently -k -n AGENT,DASH -c green,cyan "pnpm --filter @anton/agent-app dev" "cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_MOCK=0 pnpm --filter @anton/dashboard dev"
